creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin ◐ from comment #3)

I did not, its an older chip -

agp0: <Intel GM45 SVGA controller> on vgapci0
agp0: aperture size is 256M, detected 32764k stolen memory
